title: Lead Instructional Designer at Lovely Professional University

jsonLd.title: Lead Instructional Designer at Lovely Professional University
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Lovely Professional University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Instructional Designer to strengthen our Ranchi-based team.

About Lovely Professional University:
Lovely Professional University is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in school events, workshops, and training programs
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Curriculum Development
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Student Assessment

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lovely Professional University!
